string.name: permission_write_imagevideo_reason
string.value: 用于保存和发送图片、视频等媒体文件

string.name: permission_microphone_reason
string.value: 用于语音消息录制和语音/视频通话

string.name: permission_camera_reason
string.value: 用于拍照、录像和视频通话

string.name: permission_location_reason
string.value: 用于获取您的位置信息以发送位置消息和共享实时位置
